creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, Andrey. I'm sorry for delay, please put this patch file into 
/usr/ports/devel/boost-libs/files with replacing of current patch: 
http://people.freebsd.org/~rm/patch-boost_asio-ioctl . Then rebuild 
devel/boost-libs net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar-15 and 
net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar-15-python. Then start deluge and report 
back if it helped. It fixed hanging issues with deluge for me.
